Tests the behavior of multiplying Number.MIN_VALUE by -0.5 in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of JavaScript's `Number.MIN_VALUE` when multiplied by `-0.5`. It uses an `assert` statement to check if the result of this multiplication is equal to `-0`. The script is narrow in functionality, focusing on a specific edge case in floating-point arithmetic within the JavaScript language. This test helps ensure that the JavaScript engine correctly handles the multiplication of the smallest positive number representable in JavaScript with a negative fraction, resulting in negative zero.
